crime.value: Attempted murder by poison using a deadly spring-loaded box device
crime.quote: where the sharp spring like a viper's tooth emerges as you open it

victim.value: Sherlock Holmes, targeted because he posed a threat to Smith's criminal activities
victim.quote: It was clear to me, however, that by pretending that he had really succeeded in his design

closed_world.value: Holmes's Baker Street rooms and Smith's residence, connected by Watson's movements
closed_world.quote: Before the apologetic butler had delivered his message I had pushed past him and was in the room

culprit_and_motive.value: Smith, who wanted to eliminate Holmes to protect himself from exposure of his criminal schemes
culprit_and_motive.quote: Knowing his vindictive nature, I was perfectly certain that he would come to look upon his handiwork

resolution.value: Holmes reveals his deception, exposes Smith's guilt through confession, and hands him to police
resolution.quote: When we have finished at the police-station I think that something nutritious at Simpson's would not be out of place

investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes, master detective who solves the case by feigning his own death
investigator.quote: That pretence I have carried out with the thoroughness of the true artist

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect: Culverton Smith with means (poisoned ivory box), motive (inheritance - removing Savage who stood between him and reversion), and opportunity (sending packages to victims)
suspect_architecture.quote: It was by some such device that poor Savage, who stood between this monster and a reversion, was done to death

red_herring.value: Holmes's apparent deadly illness from tropical disease - elaborately staged deception including fasting, makeup, and theatrical symptoms to lure the real killer
red_herring.quote: Three days of absolute fast does not improve one's beauty, Watson. For the rest, there is nothing which a sponge may not cure

clue_fairness.value: The poisoned ivory box mechanism is revealed to Watson (and reader) after the confession, showing the spring-loaded tooth device used for murder
clue_fairness.quote: You can just see if you look at it sideways where the sharp spring like a viper's tooth emerges as you open it

social_world.value: Victorian domestic hierarchy with landlady Mrs. Hudson in awe of Holmes despite his outrageous behavior, and professional medical/detective authority structures
social_world.quote: The landlady stood in the deepest awe of him and never dared to interfere with him, however outrageous his proceedings

reveal_mechanic.value: Holmes's feigned illness draws out Smith's confession by making him believe his murder attempt succeeded, combined with technical demonstration of the poisoned box mechanism
reveal_mechanic.quote: It was clear to me, however, that by pretending that he had really succeeded in his design I might surprise a confession

investigator_wound.value: Watson's medical compassion and loyalty to Holmes is exploited - his genuine distress at Holmes's apparent illness makes the deception convincing to the real killer
investigator_wound.quote: Can you ask, my dear Watson? Do you imagine that I have no respect for your medical talents?

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the adventure of the dying detective
